stemHtml: After turning 45 degrees to the left, what is the correct procedure to intercept the inbound course for an approach?

options.a: Fly straight ahead for a given time, then turn 180 degrees to the right to intercept.
options.b: Turn 260 degrees to the right to intercept.
options.c: Fly straight ahead for a given time, then turn 180 degrees to the left to intercept.
options.d: Hold the current heading and wait for vectors from ATC to intercept the inbound course.
